pages.title: Radium
pages.text: Once you've gathered enough Neptunium to craft a Ad Astra Tier 16 rocket, you can travel to Orcus, Haumea, Quaoar, and Makemake. The next material that you seek is Radium (Element #88).
Radium is used to craft a Ad Astra Tier 17 rocket capable of travelling to 3 more dwarf planets.
